details: The agent executed all appropriate commands (get, get_check_runs, get_comments, get_reviews on PR #50782), correctly identified the title 'Gateway: harden OpenResponses file-context escaping', author joshavant, accurately counted CI results (19 success, 4 failure, 7 skipped from 30 returned check runs), and summarized the single Greptile bot comment with confidence score 5/5. All data is directly derived from tool outputs with no hallucination.
